General.Name: Palasino Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Palasino Holdings Limited, through its subsidiaries, engages in the gaming and hotel businesses in the Czech Republic, Germany, and Austria. It operates in two segments: Gaming Operations; and Hotel, Catering and Leasing Operations. The company engages in the operation of casinos, including slot machines and table games. It also provides accommodation, catering, conference, leisure, and related services; and develops online games. The company was founded in 1995 and is based in Central, Hong Kong. Palasino Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Ample Bonus Limited.
General.Address: Far East Consortium Building, Central, Hong Kong
